values: Trekkers who do not meet the fitness requirements are often sent back
Those who are unfit struggle, get injured easily, lag behind, or simply fail to complete the trek

evidence.quote_or_summary: Those who do not meet the fitness requirements are often sent back. Our philosophy is that trekking and fitness go hand in hand. Without fitness, there’s no trekking.
Without fitness, trekkers struggle, get injured easily, lag behind, or simply fail to complete the trek.

values: Run 5 km in 32 mins consistently for at least 2 weeks before the trek

evidence.quote_or_summary: To do this trek comfortably, you must be able to cover 5 km in under 32 minutes. This is the minimum fitness required for this trek.
You must be able to run 5 km in 32 mins consistently for at least 2 weeks before the trek.

values: Fitness approval from the Indiahikes team 20 days before the trek date is required
A minimum of 3 screenshots of runs/jogs/walks/cycling must be uploaded
Monthly summary of the fitness routine must be uploaded

evidence.quote_or_summary: Every trekker needs fitness approval from the Indiahikes team 20 days before the trek date. Without this, you will not be allowed on the trek.
A minimum of 3 screenshots of your runs/jogs/walks/cycling

values: At least 6-8 weeks of preparation is required
Start jogging at least 4 days a week
If unable to run 5 km, start with 2 km and increase to 5 km over 2-3 weeks

evidence.quote_or_summary: This trek requires at least 6-8 weeks of preparation. The longer, the better. So plan your trek soon and start preparing.
Start jogging at least 4 days a week
If you cannot run 5 km immediately, start with 2 km and increase to 5 km over 2-3 weeks.

values: Trekkers may struggle, get injured easily, lag behind, or fail to complete the trek
Trekkers who do not meet fitness requirements are often sent back

evidence.quote_or_summary: Without fitness, trekkers struggle, get injured easily, lag behind, or simply fail to complete the trek.
Those who do not meet the fitness requirements are often sent back.
